notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.lead: The piece you're looking for may have returned to the studio drawer.

home.heroLead: Each piece is hand-textured and stone-set in Kaunas — slow studio practice, no two alike.
home.catLead: A working index of pieces currently held in the studio drawer. Some are unique, some are made to order.
home.atelierTitle: The hand that makes the stone speak.
home.atelierText: For twenty years Rima has cast and chased her own pieces — granulated surfaces, sapphires from the studio drawer, rose-gold bezels turned warm by hand.

catalogue.empty: No pieces in this category yet.

about.title: About me
about.p1: For me, working with metal is primarily about finding texture and shapes. And that quest happens all the time — observing the world, living my everyday life, or getting to know new people. Sometimes ideas come spontaneously and spill out in sketches. Others require long puzzles, almost mosaics — countless attempts that do not leave me until I feel the completeness of the work.
about.p2: While studying at Kaunas School of Applied Arts, I also discovered the technique I liked the most — filigree on a solid surface. However, I see it as a texture, as a small element of the work, only complementing, but by no means completing, the thought of the work.
about.p3: Some pieces I create for just one special occasion; others ask me to come back to them. Let's get in touch.
about.uniqueLine: Each piece is one of a kind.

contactPage.title: Contact us
contactPage.lead: For enquiries, custom orders, or fittings — write us. We reply within two working days.

cookieNotice.body: We use a single functional cookie to remember your language. No analytics, no advertising.

privacy.title: Privacy & cookies
privacy.intro: This page describes how Rima Berg (Rimantė Landsbergienė, individual activity certificate no. 911884) handles personal data when you visit rimaberg.lt.
privacy.section1Text: Only what is needed to answer you: the contents of any e-mail you send to info@rimaberg.com (your address, message, and any attachments). Server access logs may retain your IP address and request time for up to 30 days for security purposes.
privacy.section2Text: The site stores one strictly-necessary cookie, `rb-locale`, to remember your language preference. No analytics or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.section3Text: Under the GDPR you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by writing to info@rimaberg.com. We reply within 30 days.
privacy.section4Text: Your data is never sold or shared with third parties. Email is hosted with our mail provider strictly for correspondence.

ringSize.title: Ring sizing guide
ringSize.lead: If you already know your size, use the chart below to find the equivalent in any standard. To measure at home, wrap a thin strip of paper around the base of your finger, mark where it overlaps, and divide that length by π (3.14) to get the inside diameter. Best done at the end of the day, when fingers are slightly larger.
ringSize.note: For wide bands (5 mm and up), consider going up half a size.

comingSoon.title: A space on Vilniaus g. 30
comingSoon.text: We're opening a studio-store in central Kaunas — a place to see the pieces in person and be fitted. Follow along for the opening date.
